hero.subheadline: WOT is the all-in-one AI trading education app. Learn the markets, decode your charts, and sharpen every decision with Rudy, your personal AI coach, always in your pocket.

phone.title: One app. Every edge.
phone.subtitle: From your first lesson to genuine market mastery, WOT brings together professional-grade tools and AI guidance in one clear, elegant experience.
phone.coachDesc: Ask Rudy anything about trading, from basic concepts to advanced strategies. Get personalized, judgement-free guidance available 24/7. Like having a professional mentor in your pocket.
phone.chartDesc: Upload any chart screenshot and receive instant AI analysis. Identify key support and resistance levels, trend patterns, and potential entry and exit points, all in seconds.
phone.tradeDesc: Import your MT4 or MT5 trade history and let AI find patterns in your trading. Discover your strengths, identify recurring mistakes, and get actionable insights to improve.
phone.toolsDesc: Position size calculator, economic calendar, multilingual glossary with {count} terms, interactive quizzes with leaderboard, everything a serious trader needs, in one app.

aiSuite.card1Desc: Your 24/7 trading mentor. Ask anything. Get answers backed by market data, not generic advice.
aiSuite.card2Desc: Upload a screenshot. Get instant analysis: structure, key levels, entries, exits.
aiSuite.card3Desc: Import MT4/MT5. AI scans for patterns, biases, and recurring mistakes.

glossaryPreview.title: {count} terms. 18 categories.
glossaryPreview.subtitle: The largest multilingual trading glossary, clear definitions, real context, built for everyone.
definitions: The smallest standard price move in a forex pair, your unit for measuring gains and losses.
A momentum oscillator from 0 to 100 that flags overbought and oversold conditions.
A resting order that closes a trade at a set price to cap your downside risk.
Using borrowed capital to control a larger position than your account balance alone.
Institutional order flow that drives price toward liquidity, the core of ICT concepts.
The number of units in a single trade, defining how much each pip is worth.

lessons.title: Learn trading like a craft.
lessons.subtitle: Structured lessons on every concept that matters, from market psychology to risk management, from technical analysis to market structure. A progression built to turn theory into real instincts.

rewards.title: Learn. Test. Win.
rewards.description: Every lesson and quiz moves you forward. WOT turns learning into a game with real stakes, so building your knowledge actually feels rewarding.
rewards.point1: Earn WOT Coins on every quiz

pricing.title: One app. One price. Every tool.
pricing.subtitle: Full access to all 8 tools and 3 AI models. Pick the plan that fits. Cancel anytime.
pricing.footnote: Cancel anytime from your Apple ID / Google Play account.

stats.title: Trusted by a growing community
stats.subtitle: Thousands of traders are already learning the WOT way.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps from curious beginner to confident trader.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Get WOT free on iOS or Android and create your profile in seconds.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Follow guided lessons, ask Rudy anything, and build real understanding at your own pace.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Apply your knowledge with pro tools, analyze every trade, and grow with each decision.

cta.subheadline: Join thousands of traders learning smarter with Rudy. Download WOT and turn market confusion into confident decisions.
cta.trustNote: Free to download · Available on iOS and Android

footer.tagline: The smarter way to learn trading, AI coaching, pro tools, and a multilingual glossary in one app.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Way of Trading · All rights reserved
footer.disclaimer: Trading carries risk · past performance ≠ future results
